description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:16.20.2 Docker image. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, caches the docs/node_modules/ directory, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. The job must execute the exact shell commands: git remote rm origin, git remote add origin https://access_cicd:$ACCESS_TOKEN@gitlab.com/DGothrek/ipyaggrid.git, git subtree push --prefix docs/notebooks/ origin binder-demo, mkdir public, cd docs, npm install, and npm run docs:build. Set the variable GIT_TRACING to "2".
